test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_table_small_{array_type} SELECT groupArraySample(3500)(rand64()) AS set, groupArraySample(350)(rand64()) AS subset FROM numbers(15000000) GROUP BY number % 3500;
INSERT INTO test_table_medium_{array_type} SELECT groupArraySample(35000)(rand64()) AS set, groupArraySample(3500)(rand64()) AS subset FROM numbers(18000000) GROUP BY number % 35000;
INSERT INTO test_table_large_{array_type} SELECT groupArraySample(350000)(rand64()) AS set, groupArraySample(350000)(rand64()) AS subset FROM numbers(10000000) GROUP BY number % 350000;
test.query: SELECT hasAll(set, subset) FROM test_table_small_{array_type} FORMAT Null
SELECT hasAll(set, subset) FROM test_table_medium_{array_type} FORMAT Null
SELECT hasAll(set, subset) FROM test_table_large_{array_type} FORMAT Null
